tasks.title: Approve the portable agent campaigns design

decisionEnvelope: Define a portable multi-harness campaign plugin, task authority, security boundaries, UI, and provenance model

acceptanceCriteria: The written design is explicitly approved and committed
verification: git show 2219d0c4504989aae32569f8fbdb2e9eb6073e1f:docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-20-portable-agent-campaigns-plugin-design.md

tasks.title: Write the foundation and task-source implementation plan
acceptanceCriteria: The plan has exact files, interfaces, red-green steps, commands, commits, and a verified boundary
verification: Verify 11 task sections, 60 unchecked checkpoints, balanced code fences, and git diff --check

iterations.outcomeReason: Executable foundation plan written and self-reviewed

acceptanceCriteria: Complete every acceptance proof in foundation plan Task 1
verification: Run the commands in foundation plan Task 1

verification: Run the commands in foundation plan Task 2

verification: Run the commands in foundation plan Task 4

verification: Run the commands in foundation plan Task 5

tasks.title: Independently review the completed foundation boundary
acceptanceCriteria: All foundation findings are resolved or explicitly accepted before dependent implementation begins
verification: Run pnpm check and both task-source conformance suites from a clean worktree

iterations.outcomeReason: Independent foundation review findings resolved; pnpm check green

tasks.title: Close external-adapter cleanup and isolation contract
acceptanceCriteria: TaskSource exposes optional dispose()
quirks-tasks always disposes the source in finally
External adapter HOME sandbox is removed by dispose and dispose is idempotent
verification: node --test dist/test/task-source/external/*.test.js
pnpm check

iterations.outcomeReason: Optional TaskSource.dispose cleans adapter sandboxes from CLI

tasks.title: Write the campaign control-plane and runner implementation plan
acceptanceCriteria: Plan campaign state, approval, scheduling, runner IPC, recovery, budgets, and fake-runner acceptance with TDD steps
verification: Self-review every control-plane trust boundary against the approved spec

tasks.title: Implement campaign schemas, canonical state, and approval events
deliverables: Versioned campaign, state, event, and approval schemas
acceptanceCriteria: Complete the corresponding approved control-plane plan tasks
verification: Run the corresponding focused schema and recovery suites

tasks.title: Implement preflight, dependency scheduling, and the supervisor state machine
deliverables: Deterministic campaign control plane and immutable approval envelope
acceptanceCriteria: No task claim or dispatch is possible before durable exact-envelope approval
verification: Run scheduler, approval replay, drift, and interruption suites

tasks.title: Implement runner profiles and Claude, Codex, and Cursor CLI contracts
deliverables: Versioned runner protocol, profiles, probes, and three CLI adapters
acceptanceCriteria: Adapters preserve sandbox, model tier, account, session, output, and permission semantics
verification: Run fake CLI contract tests before any paid real-runner probe

tasks.title: Implement watchdog, resume, budgets, quota routing, and circuit breakers
deliverables: Durable runner liveness and bounded routing control
acceptanceCriteria: Crash and quota recovery never duplicate unsafe work or broaden approval
verification: Run fake-runner crash, wedge, quota, timeout, cancellation, and recovery suites

tasks.title: Verify the campaign control plane with fake runners and hosts
deliverables: Deterministic fake-runner and fake-host acceptance evidence
acceptanceCriteria: All control-plane failure and recovery paths pass without real provider access
verification: Run the full fake-runner integration matrix

tasks.title: Write the local control UI implementation plan
acceptanceCriteria: Plan loopback security, approval API, task/history views, visual states, and browser tests with TDD steps
verification: Self-review every UI authorization and hostile-data boundary against the approved spec

tasks.title: Implement the ephemeral loopback UI security boundary and approval API
deliverables: Loopback-only server, security headers, nonce CSP, one-time approval token, and JSON API
acceptanceCriteria: Cross-origin, wrong-host, replay, stale-digest, form, GET mutation, and hostile-content tests fail closed
verification: Run focused UI security and API tests

tasks.title: Implement Existing Tasks, Preflight, Campaigns, and Task History views
deliverables: Provider-neutral task, proposal, campaign, and provenance projections
acceptanceCriteria: Views show exact tasks, ordering, ownership, source freshness, commits, PRs, identities, and unavailable references without copying source content
verification: Run component/read-model tests with hostile paths, metadata, logs, and task text

tasks.title: Verify local UI security, accessibility, and responsive layouts
deliverables: Automated browser evidence across approved desktop and narrow layouts
acceptanceCriteria: No overlap, clipping, unsafe rendering, inaccessible approval controls, or authorization regression remains
verification: Run browser, accessibility, CSP, header, replay, and screenshot suites

tasks.title: Write the skills and Git integration implementation plan
acceptanceCriteria: Plan skill baseline/forward tests, worktrees, review, merge, approved push, and provenance write-back
verification: Self-review skill authority and Git mutation boundaries against the approved spec

tasks.title: Baseline-test and author dispatching-external-agents
acceptanceCriteria: Skill delegates only through approved runner profiles and deterministic control-plane transitions
verification: Run skill baseline and forward tests plus fake-runner dispatch tests

tasks.title: Baseline-test and author writing-tasks, updating-tasks, and executing-tasks
deliverables: Canonical writing-tasks, updating-tasks, and executing-tasks skills
acceptanceCriteria: The three skills use only the selected TaskSource, preserve canonical status ownership, and update compact provenance through validated CLI operations
verification: Run baseline and forward tests for authoring, updating, executing, conflict, and sync behavior

tasks.title: Baseline-test and author delegated-brainstorming
acceptanceCriteria: Human-guided design remains default and delegated principal author/reviewer authority stays inside the approved decision envelope
verification: Run skill baseline, delegated design, reviewer independence, and authority-denial tests

tasks.title: Baseline-test and author running-agent-campaigns
acceptanceCriteria: The parent skill preflights, asks about external routing, renders exact approval, supervises tasks, and reports without bypassing the control plane
verification: Run skill baseline, forward, denial, recovery, and exact-envelope tests

tasks.title: Implement isolated worktrees, integration branches, and review lanes
deliverables: Scoped worktree, branch, integration, review, and cleanup control
acceptanceCriteria: Only approved task commits reach the exact integration and target boundaries
verification: Run dirty-tree, conflict, wrong-base, wrong-target, stale-review, and interruption suites

tasks.title: Implement merge, exact approved push, and provenance write-back
deliverables: Verified merge, optional approved push, and compact canonical task provenance
acceptanceCriteria: Push is impossible unless exact remote and branch are in the approved envelope and final verification passes
verification: Run local bare-remote tests for wrong remote, wrong branch, drift, rejection, replay, and provenance acknowledgement

tasks.title: Write the host integration and acceptance implementation plan
acceptanceCriteria: Plan package installation, three harness integrations, portability fixtures, real smoke evidence, marketplace installation, and bounded first campaign
verification: Self-review host-specific authority and dated evidence requirements

tasks.title: Package the plugin and integrate Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor hosts
deliverables: Codex plugin manifest, personal marketplace metadata, and canonical host installation references
acceptanceCriteria: All hosts use the same maintained skills without project copies or silent host authority
verification: Run clean-home install, upgrade, uninstall, and skill-discovery tests for all three hosts

tasks.title: Run portable JSON and external-source end-to-end fixtures
deliverables: Disposable end-to-end evidence for both v1 task sources and all three hosts
acceptanceCriteria: A clean fixture completes preflight through final report with crash recovery and no hidden host assumptions
verification: Run the full portable fixture, UI, sync, provenance, Git, and fake-runner suite

tasks.title: Run the dated nine-cell real host and runner smoke matrix
deliverables: Dated, redacted evidence for each Claude Code, Codex, and Cursor host/runner pairing
acceptanceCriteria: Every cell records version, account/profile, model, flags, result, session behavior, and bounded artifact digest
verification: Validate all nine evidence records and confirm no credential or personal path persisted

tasks.title: Install from the personal marketplace and run one bounded real campaign
deliverables: One bounded real-project campaign report with exact commits and source acknowledgements
acceptanceCriteria: The real run stays inside the approved tasks, routes, budget, Git target, and external authority
verification: Review final report, canonical task status, Git target, sync outbox, and redacted evidence

tasks.title: Plan the post-v1 built-in provider adapter SDK
acceptanceCriteria: Plan capability mapping, revisions, credentials, sync, provenance, conformance, and packaging without changing campaign core
verification: Review the SDK plan against the v1 shared conformance suite

tasks.title: Implement the post-v1 GitHub Issues adapter
acceptanceCriteria: Adapter passes the shared contract without weakening GitHub revision, identity, or permission semantics
verification: Run shared conformance plus disposable GitHub integration tests

tasks.title: Implement the post-v1 Linear adapter
acceptanceCriteria: Adapter passes the shared contract without weakening Linear revision, identity, or permission semantics
verification: Run shared conformance plus disposable Linear integration tests

tasks.title: Implement the post-v1 Jira adapter
acceptanceCriteria: Adapter passes the shared contract without weakening Jira revision, identity, or permission semantics
verification: Run shared conformance plus disposable Jira integration tests

tasks.title: Implement the post-v1 ClickUp adapter
acceptanceCriteria: Adapter passes the shared contract without weakening ClickUp revision, identity, or permission semantics
verification: Run shared conformance plus disposable ClickUp integration tests
